overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through a dimly lit living space with cyan overhead lighting and red neon accents, moving from a seating area toward an exit door.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the futuristic apartment living space, observing the minimalist furniture and neon lighting

entered.detail: modern white L-shaped sofa with clean lines positioned against the right wall
decorative red coral-like branch sculpture placed on a surface near the sofa
low rectangular glass table situated in front of the white sofa
large square cyan light panels embedded in the dark ceiling providing ambient illumination
tall vertical strip of red neon lighting on the far left wall near the kitchen area
dark countertop with various items along the left wall of the apartment
polished dark marble flooring with subtle reflective properties covering the room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a sleek, minimalist cyberpunk apartment living area. A white sectional sofa and red decorative sculpture occupy the right side, while cyan ceiling panels cast a cool glow over the dark marble floor. A red neon strip illuminates the kitchen counter area on the left as the player explores the space.

events.description: exit door with red overhead lighting comes into view at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the exit door at the end of the apartment, leaving the living area behind

entered.detail: dark door with horizontal red light strip above it marking the apartment exit

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the apartment, the camera approaches an exit door illuminated by a red light bar above it. The living room furniture disappears from view as the perspective shifts to focus on the doorway. The cyan ceiling panels continue to light the way as the distance to the exit closes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sleek, minimalist cyberpunk apartment that transitions from an open living area toward a focused exit point. It begins by gliding across a dark marble floor, passing a white sectional sofa and a red decorative sculpture under the cool glow of cyan ceiling panels. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts away from the living room furniture and toward a kitchen counter area illuminated by a red neon strip. The scene then narrows its focus as the player approaches the far end of the room, with the cyan overhead lighting guiding the way. Finally, the view settles on an exit door marked by a glowing red light bar as the surrounding apartment interior recedes from view.
